creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202036
Patch to update to 20190213

gtk-arc-themes has a new upstream site and now its version is 20190213.

Summary of port changes:
- Switch to new upstream and update to 20190213
- Remove unnecessary BUILD_DEPENDS and add necessary ones
- Define options for Cinnamon, Gnome-shell, Metacity, etc.
- Use Adwaita for icon and cursor themes.
- Reorder some make variables to make portlint happy.

New upstream WWW: https://github.com/NicoHood/arc-theme
